goal_text:
You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants.
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve 'chinese' food and should be in the 'centre'.
The restaurant should be in the 'moderate' price range.
Make sure you get 'phone number'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be 'in the same area as the restaurant' and should be in the type of 'hotel'.
The hotel 'doesn't need to have free parking' and should have 'a star of 0'.
Make sure you get 'price range' and 'address'.
You also want to book a 'taxi' to commute between the two places.
You want to leave the 'hotel' by '19:15'.
Make sure you get 'contact number' and 'car type'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

book.destination: restaurant that the user will book
book.departure: accommodation that the user will book

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve chinese food and should be in the centre
The restaurant should be in the moderate price range
Make sure you get phone number
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the same area as the restaurant and should be in the type of hotel
The hotel doesn't need to have free parking and should have a star of 0
Make sure you get price range and address
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to leave the hotel by 19:15
Make sure you get contact number and car type
